headline: Vulcan Materials Outlook Tested As Q4 Miss Fuels Demand Concerns
summary: Vulcan Materials (NYSE:VMC) reported Q4 2025 results that missed revenue and earnings expectations. The company issued 2026 guidance that did not ease investor concerns about demand trends. A major analyst downgraded the stock, citing ongoing demand challenges and uncertainty in the residential sector. Vulcan Materials is a large producer of aggregates and construction materials, so its results often reflect conditions in infrastructure, commercial, and residential building activity. Recent...

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Vulcan Materials, Raises Price Target to $322
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Angel Castillo   maintains Vulcan Materials (NYSE:VMC) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $321 to $322.

headline: Assessing Vulcan Materials (VMC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Vulcan Materials stock snapshot Vulcan Materials (VMC) has been on many investors’ radars after a recent period of weaker short term returns, with the share price down 4.3% over the past day and 10.2% over the past week. See our latest analysis for Vulcan Materials. That short term weakness follows a 30 day share price return of 15.05% decline and a 90 day share price return of 5.51% decline.
